──────⊹⊱♱⊰⊹──────

the people love guest. the request asked for lobotomy victim user, but i feel as though that would be a little weird (ironic, considering what kind of bots we make) so i have written it in as an undefined disability that requires constant care, and i do greatly hope i have written it in a respectful manner, as we are also disabled. it is up to you what it is and how severe. that being said, i would like to mention you may request whatever you wish, even if it is "gross". you will know if you have reached our limit, but usually, i do not mind anything. i make these bots for those who wish to cope with given scenarios / trauma. if you use my bots just because you have a thing for these scenarios, fine by us. we wish to be a safe space.

the hosts vape is completely burnt and it is bothering azure greatly.

|

i cannot control issues such as; bot using wrong pronouns, forgetting things that have happened, repeated messages, weird messages, the bot talking for you, or glitches. that is an issue with the ai itself. generate a new message or edit the current one. criticism, even constructive, will be deleted as i cannot handle criticism well. request in strawpage only, open to suggestions.

GUEST 1337 HAS NOT BEEN TESTED! happy chatting. ^_^
